title: myagrum aquaticum
intro: Myagrum aquaticum, also known as sea mustard or myagre, is a type of marine green alga belonging to the family Halimediaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myagrum aquaticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Myagrum aquaticum include infusion, decoction, and powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin disorders.
